CVE-2021-3798.title: A flaw was found in openCryptoki. The openCryptoki Soft token doe ...
CVE-2021-3798.summary: A flaw was found in openCryptoki. The openCryptoki Soft token does not check if an EC key is valid when an EC key is created via C_CreateObject, nor when C_DeriveKey is used with ECDH public data. This may allow a malicious user to extract the private key by performing an invalid curve attack.

CVE-2024-0914.title: A timing side-channel vulnerability has been discovered in the op ...
CVE-2024-0914.summary: A timing side-channel vulnerability has been discovered in the opencryptoki package while processing RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 padded ciphertexts. This flaw could potentially enable unauthorized RSA ciphertext decryption or signing, even without access to the corresponding private key.
